sglang.title: Fix OOM by offloading multimodal features to CPU after embedding
sglang.author: liusy58
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the multimodal scheduling flow, image/audio features are moved to the GPU during the prepare_for_extend phase. However, these tensors remained on the GPU throughout the entire generation process (Decode phase), even though they are only utilized once during Prefill stage.
Modifications

sglang.title: SGLang Tracing: Supports propagating trace headers through sgl.Engine…
sglang.author: sufeng-buaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Dynamo directly invokes SGLang through sgl.Engine, and thus cannot propagate trace context via request headers as in the HTTP API approach. Therefore, trace context must be explicitly propagated through the sgl.Engine interface.
Modifications

Accuracy Tests

Benchmarking and Profiling

sglang.title: perf(tree): optimize input_char_count calculation
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Remove advance_by_chars call in partial match case by computing input_char_count directly from input text instead of tracking remaining slice through traversal.
This eliminates overhead in the hot path while maintaining correctness. The sum (matched_chars + remaining.chars().count()) is mathematical

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Update MiniCPM model test: MiniCPM3-4B to MiniCPM4.1-8B and simplify attention backend testing
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR updates the language model generation tests for ROCm CI by upgrading the MiniCPM model from v3 to v4.1, removing explicit AITER kernel testing in favor of default backend dispatching, and adding embedding scaling support for MiniCPM models.
Changes
1. Model Upgrade: MiniCPM3-4B to MiniCPM4.1

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix BAGEL online serving for text and image understanding
vllm.author: Dylan1229
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix BAGEL model online serving via vLLM API. This PR resolves two issues that prevented BAGEL from working with vLLM's OpenAI-compatible API.
Fixes: #31375

Summary of Changes
Fix 1: BagelProcessor returns wrong type
BagelProcessor.__call__ was returning BatchEncoding instead of BatchFeature

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix async scheduling for pooling models
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix race condition for pooling model with async scheduling.
Also:

Move output cpu copy to dedicated stream which should hopefully unblock async performance gains
Some adjacent optimizations and code simplifications

Fixes #31570

vllm.title: [CI][Bugfix] Fix token counting in chunked prefill streaming test
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes flaky assertion failure in test_chat_completion_stream_options_and_logprobs_with_long_prompts.
Problem
The test assumed a 1:1 correspondence between streaming chunks and tokens. However, vLLM can batch multiple tokens into a single SSE chunk, causing the assertion chunk.usage.completion_tokens

vllm.title: [Audio] Improve Audio Inference Scripts (offline/online)
vllm.author: ekagra-ranjan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Improve audio inference scripts:

offline inference: vary the audio input in BS>1 instead of using the same input many times to avoid cache reuse
online inference:
a. add calling the endpoint directly without OAI SDK.
b. Add using custom audio as input using --audio_path

Test
offline: time VLLM_USE
